name: atbsocialmedia
description: ATBSocialMedia - Tam otonom sosyal medya ve WhatsApp yönetim platformu

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=backend && npm run lint --workspace=frontend
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && pm2 start ecosystem.config.js
